calendar.matters:
Mtn For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Sanctions

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Jan A. Yoss, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Alireza Moheb, and with Witness: Homayoun Tom Khorram, parties were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Pejam Golkar.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal $200,000.00
Interest at the rate of 18% from 07-11-11 to today to be calculated by counsel.
Counsel stated that the proposed Judgment will be submiited to Dept. 514 for approval by tomorrow.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2011 Text Ruling

(Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Per Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (610)
